description_long: This rifle features a distinctive pastel color scheme, with a turquoise receiver, barrel, and magazine, complemented by pink and black chevron-patterned grips and stock. The weapon has a classic AK-style silhouette, including a fixed wooden stock, a curved detachable magazine, and a prominent front sight post. The handguard and pistol grip are both covered in the same pink and black pattern, providing visual contrast and a textured appearance. The barrel is standard length, ending in a simple muzzle device, likely a flash hider. The receiver is smooth and unadorned, with a visible safety lever and magazine release. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A pastel turquoise and pink AK-style rifle with chevron-patterned grips, fixed stock, and a curved magazine. The design is visually striking and functional, with classic features and a unique color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full profile, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and chevron-patterned grips.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, safety lever, and the overall silhouette of the rifle.
